seo.title: BuzzFeed NewFronts — BEATROX Event Production
seo.description: Beatrox produced BuzzFeed's 2016 NewFronts event at Moynihan Station, New York — a custom-built stage with projection mapping, individually mapped orbs, and immersive multimedia content showcasing BuzzFeed's creative process.

og.title: BuzzFeed NewFronts 2016 — Event Production
og.description: Custom stage, individually mapped projection orbs, and multimedia content at Moynihan Station — Beatrox produced BuzzFeed's 2016 NewFronts event.

hero.headline: BuzzFeed NewFronts
hero.subheadline: A visually stunning event production for BuzzFeed's 2016 NewFronts — custom stage design, projection mapping, and individually mapped orbs at Moynihan Station.

metadata.type: Event Production, Multimedia Design, Stage Design, Lighting Design

body.heading: Design Objective
body.content: To create a memorable and engaging event experience for guests at BuzzFeed's 2016 NewFronts, showcasing BuzzFeed's creative process for creating content and demonstrating their ability to meet the needs of their audience. The event space was designed with a purposeful flow and highlighted with large projection screens and individually mapped orbs, creating a visually stunning atmosphere that captivated attendees.

body.heading: Design Concept
body.content:
The event aimed to highlight BuzzFeed's ability to feed the hearts, minds, and businesses of their audience — showcasing their creative process through a unique and immersive event experience. The main presentation took place on a custom-built stage that incorporated projection mapping, multimedia content production, pre-visualization, interactive programming, and custom fabrication to bring the event to life.

Individually mapped projection orbs suspended throughout the space created a striking visual environment that reinforced BuzzFeed's identity as a creative media powerhouse. Every lighting cue and projection sequence was custom-programmed to support the presentation flow.

body.heading: Key Features
items: Custom-built presentation stage with full projection mapping integration
Individually mapped projection orbs suspended throughout the venue
Large-format projection screen system for main presentation
Multimedia content production tailored to BuzzFeed's brand
Custom fabrication of stage and scenic elements
Media server programming for seamless live playback
